nodes.label: Pluggable Vector Storage Backends
nodes.rationale: turbovec is the zero-configuration default; FAISS is an opt-in alternative selected before the first index is built. Once an index exists, the backend is fixed — a configured/recorded mismatch forces a rebuild from SQLite rather than serving mixed artifacts. Vector backend supports facet-scoped nearest-neighbor search via an allowlist of vector ids derived from the SQLite facet filter; results are not over-fetched and post-filtered. Persisted index survives restart, fully rebuildable from SQLite without re-embedding; load verifies backend/model/dimension match before serving.
